zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Basset, Lord of Brailsford於1350年出生在英國英格蘭德比夏爾布拉爾斯福德 格林時，他的父親John Basset46歲，母親Joan de Brailsford32歲。他於1374年與Margery Meringe在英國德比夏爾布拉爾斯福德 格林結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1390年在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾梅爾享年40歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas Basset, Lord of Brailsford于1350年出生在英国英格兰德比夏爾布拉爾斯福德 格林时，他的父亲John Basset46岁，母亲Joan de Brailsford32岁。他于1374年与Margery Meringe在英国德比夏爾布拉爾斯福德 格林结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1390年在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾梅爾享年40岁。

nameMeanings.name: Basset,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: from a diminutive of Old French bas(se) ‘short, of low stature’ (see Bas ).
English: variant of   Bassett  , a cognate of 1 above.
In some cases also an altered form of French Besset (see Bessette 2). Compare Bassette 1.

variants.name: Bas
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Mauricio, Abelardo, Florencio, Francisco, Jorge, Luis, Manuel, Pedro, Soledad, Vicente.  Eastern Slavic Dmytro, Liya, Pyotr, Sergey.
Catalan: habitational name from a place so named in the district of La Garrotxa, Catalonia.
Basque: topographic name for someone who lived by a wood, from baso ‘wood, forest’.

nameMeanings.name: Lord
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English laford, louerd, lord ‘lord, master’ (Old English hlāford), perhaps given to a someone who played the part of the lord or master of ceremonies in festival games.
Irish: adoption of the English name (see 1 above) as a translation of the main element of Gaelic Ó Tighearnaigh (see Tierney ) and Mac Thighearnáin (see McKiernan ).
Americanized form of French Laure, a variant of the personal name Laur 3.

variants.name: Tierney
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Eamon, John Patrick, Brigid, Clodagh, Kieran, Michael Sean, Siobhan.

Irish: shortened form of O'Tierney, an Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Tíghearnaigh ‘descendant of Tighearnach’, a byname meaning ‘lord, master’. The Gaelic name is sometimes ‘translated’ as English Lord . Compare Tiernan .

variants.name: Lords
meanings: English: variant of Lord , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Korean Kyong, Kyong Suk, Young, Chae, Chi Young, Hang, Kil, Rin, Sang Hun, Chang, Chong, Insoo, Kum, Sun Young, Yom, Young Hwan.  Cambodian Kiwan, Oeurn, Phoeun, Pich, Saroeuth, Seung, Sophath, Sophea, Yoeun, Phan, Son.  Indian Shanti, Harendra.
Indian (Uttar Pradesh): Brahmin name, from Sanskrit om, the Hindu sacred and mystic syllable uttered at the beginning of prayers.
Cambodian: written ឱម, corresponding to the exclamation of solemn affirmation, of Sanskrit origin (see 1 above), chanted by Buddhist monks.

variants.name: Oum
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Southeast Asian Heang, Hye, Kam, Kan, Kheng, Khin, Kun, Sang, Sok, Phong, Yom, Yoo, Youn, Cuong, Phal, Samnang, Tin.  Cambodian Sokha, Chheang, Choeun, Moeun, Roeun, Sambath, Samoeun, Savuth, Soeun, Sopheap.
Cambodian: written អ៊ុំ, from a Khmer word denoting an elder sibling of one's parent (i.e. ‘uncle’ or ‘aunt’). Compare   Om   3 and   Um   2.

nameMeanings.name: Brailsford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (East Midlands and Yorkshire): habitational name from a place in Derbyshire named Brailsford, possibly from an Old English word brægels, a metathesized form of bærgels, itself a byform of byrgels ‘tumulus, barrow’, + ford ‘ford’.

variants.name: Brelsford
meanings: English (Lancashire): variant of   Brailsford  .

nameMeanings.name: Sir
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Simon , now rare, but more common in the Middle Ages, when it gave rise to the surnames Simms and Simpson.

variants.name: Simon
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Basset, Lord of Brailsford was born in 1350, in Brailsford Green, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Basset, was 46 and his mother, Joan de Brailsford, was 32. He married Margery Meringe in 1374, in Brailsford Green, Derbyshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. He died in 1390, in Meering, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 40.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Basset, Lord of Brailsfordが1350年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアブレイルスフォード グレンで生まれた時，父John Bassetは46歳，母Joan de Brailsfordは32歳であった。1374年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアブレイルスフォード グレンでMargery Meringeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1390年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアメエリングで40歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Basset, Lord of Brailsford(이)가 1350년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 브레이스퍼드 그린에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Basset(은)는 46세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan de Brailsford(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1374년 영국 더비실르 브레이스퍼드 그린에서 Margery Meringe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1390년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 메링에서 40세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Basset, Lord of Brailsford родился в 1350 г. в местности бреилсфорд грин, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Basset было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan de Brailsford, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Margery Meringe в 1374 г. в местности бреилсфорд грин, дирбишир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1390 г. в местности миринг, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 40 лет.
